seoTitle: Parrearra vs Passchendaele — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parrearra and Passchendaele. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parrearra and Passchendaele.
heading: Parrearra vs Passchendaele — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parrearra, Queensland and Passchendaele, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parrearra has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Passchendaele (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parrearra or Passchendaele safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parrearra has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Passchendaele scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parrearra scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Passchendaele scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parrearra or Passchendaele?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parrearra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
